locations.name: 山门遗迹
locations.description: 残破山门立于灵雾中，断裂符纹仍残留微光
locations.lighting: 晨雾中的青白日光，符纹明灭

visual.description: ruined xianxia mountain gate in mist, broken talisman pillars, faint cyan spiritual light, cliff edge

locations.name: 断剑石林
locations.description: 无数断剑插在石林，剑意未散
locations.lighting: 雾中冷色漫射，剑身反光

visual.description: field of broken ancient swords in stone forest, mist, xianxia forbidden land, ink-wash mountains

locations.name: 封印祭坛
locations.description: 古老祭坛符文碎裂，黑气自裂缝渗出
locations.lighting: 幽绿灵光与暗紫邪气交错

visual.description: ancient sealing altar, cracked golden runes, green and purple spiritual mist, ruined xianxia temple

locations.name: 古井
locations.description: 井口阴风阵阵，井壁刻满褪色剑诀
locations.lighting: 井口天光与井下幽暗对比

visual.description: ancient well on misty cliff, sword scripture carvings, ink painting style, eerie cyan glow from depth

locations.name: 灵气裂隙
locations.description: 地面裂开，紊乱灵气如刃溢出
locations.lighting: 裂隙下涌出的青紫异光

visual.description: spiritual energy rift in mountain ground, chaotic cyan purple light, broken formation flags, xianxia landscape

locations.name: 迷雾栈道
locations.description: 悬于崖壁的木栈道，雾中难辨五步之外

visual.description: misty cliffside wooden walkway, ancient vines, flying sword silhouette in fog, Chinese ink painting

locations.name: 地下剑冢
locations.description: 地下洞窟剑冢，钟鸣自深处传来
locations.lighting: 幽蓝剑光与金色古纹点缀黑暗

visual.description: underground sword grave hall, ancient broken formation, cyan spiritual mist, golden runes, xianxia storybook
